briefing: Markets are in moderate risk-on mode today (NASDAQ +1.1%, S&P 500 +0.7%) with $677 in idle cash and four open slots — conditions that call for deploying capital into the best available setup. SEDG is the clear choice: it is the only ticker on the list with all five confirmation signals, including the institutional-grade volume surge that distinguishes genuine momentum from noise. All six existing positions are held; none appear close to their stop-loss or profit-target thresholds based on current market tone.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume exceeds its 20-day average by 50% or more, and it matters because volume is the market's 'voting machine.' When price rises on heavy volume, it signals that large institutional buyers — mutual funds, hedge funds, pension funds — are actively accumulating shares, not just retail noise. A breakout accompanied by a volume surge is far more likely to sustain itself than one on thin, average volume.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增，是指某檔股票的單日成交量超過20日均量1.5倍以上。成交量之所以重要，在於它是市場的「投票機器」——當股價在大量成交的配合下上漲，代表的是基金、對沖基金等機構投資者正在積極建倉，而非散戶短線炒作。伴隨成交量激增的突破，遠比在清淡成交量下的上漲更具持續力，這也是今日選入SolarEdge（SEDG）的關鍵訊號之一。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities extended their rally on July 6, 2026, with the NASDAQ gaining 1.1% and the S&P 500 adding 0.7%, driven by continued optimism around resilient corporate earnings and easing concerns over Federal Reserve rate policy. Technology and growth names led the advance as investors interpreted recent macro data as supportive of a soft-landing scenario. No major geopolitical shocks disrupted sentiment, allowing risk appetite to build steadily through the session.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年7月6日，美國股市延續升勢，納斯達克指數上漲1.1%，標普500指數上揚0.7%。市場信心主要來自企業盈利持續穩健，以及聯儲局加息周期接近尾聲的預期。科技及成長股領漲，投資者普遍認為近期宏觀數據支持「軟著陸」情境，整體風險偏好在無重大地緣政治衝擊下穩步回升。

trades.reasoning: Highest-scoring candidate (100) with all five confirmation signals firing simultaneously: RSI in bullish zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge confirming institutional participation — the exact multi-signal setup the strategy requires before deploying cash.
